nasb.text: Reaiah the son of Shobal became the father of Jahath, and Jahath became the father of Ahumai and Lahad. These were the families of the Zorathites.

esv.text: Reaiah the son of Shobal fathered Jahath, and Jahath fathered Ahumai and Lahad. These were the clans of the Zorathites.

cnv.text: 朔巴的兒子利亞雅生雅哈；雅哈生亞戶買和拉哈。以上這些都是瑣拉人的家族。

ccb.text: 朔巴的儿子利亚雅生雅哈，雅哈生亚户买和拉哈。他们都属于琐拉人的宗族。
